texto: If you want to move on, you actually have to make the decision to move on. It won't happen automatically. You have to say, "I deserve better than this and no longer am I going to let this get the better of me", and then take the necessary action to move on with your life.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Karon Waddell sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “If you want to move on, you actually have to make the decision to move on. It won't happen automa…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, life-experience, life-lessons, útil em momentos de life-experience e life-lessons.
